extract: Aquacorde Town (Japanese: メイスイタウン Meisui Town) is a town located in the southeastern part of the Kalos region. It is the place where the player gets their first partner Pokémon. To the town's south is Route 1, while north is Route 2 and Santalune Forest. The town has a classic colonial appearance with several European-style apartment buildings and streetlights. It is bordered on the north by a river, and in the center of the town is a fountain.
